---
title: "Set up attestation"
date: last-modified
aliases:
  - /guide/set-up-attestation.html
---

Set up an attestation to capture model attributes at a specific point in time. This process involves configuring the attestation schedule, custom fields, and questionnaire for model owners.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] The model is already registered in the model inventory.[^1]
- [x] Model validation findings have been documented.[^2]
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to set up attestations.[^3]

:::

## Steps

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

2. Under Workspace Settings, select **{{< fa file-circle-plus >}} Attestations**.

3. Click **{{< fa plus >}} New Attestation**.

4. Configure the attestation schedule:
   - Enter a name for the attestation period (e.g., "Q1 attestation")
   - Set the start date when attestations will be created
   - Set the end date when attestations must be completed

5. Add custom fields to display specific model information:
   - Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Field**
   - Configure field properties (name, type, required status)
   - Repeat for all needed fields

6. Create the questionnaire:
   - Use the CK editor to create structured questions
   - Add sections to organize the questions
   - Configure any required responses

7. Configure attestation settings:
   - Set up required approvers and their roles
   - Define approval workflows
   - Add compliance requirements
   - Configure document sections and guidelines

8. Click **{{< fa paper-plane >}} Create Attestation** to schedule the attestation.

::: {.callout}
When the start date is reached, attestation instances will be automatically created for each model owner. They will receive a banner notification on their dashboard about pending attestations.
:::

## What's next

- [Review attestation](review-attestation.qmd)
- [Approve attestation](approve-attestation.qmd)
- [Manage attestation templates](manage-attestation-templates.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register models in the inventory](/guide/model-inventory/register-models-in-inventory.qmd)

[^2]: [Working with model findings](/guide/model-validation/working-with-model-findings.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)
